query: Review TWIS draft article The West Built the Cheap China System. Now It Wants Poor People to Pay More.
result_summary: Article draft identified as the single controlled source for testing a second TWIS article Evidence Pack workflow.
limits: No broader source discovery was attempted because this pack tests the mechanics of a small article proof trail, not a full research question.

query: EU 3 euro customs duty low-value e-commerce parcels July 2026 Reuters Council
result_summary: Reuters report found covering the EU finance ministers' agreement on a temporary 3 euro duty for low-value e-commerce parcels from July 1, 2026.
limits: Only one external source was added in this PR. The pack still needs primary EU source checking and separate evidence for consumer-price effects before publication use.

query: European Commission IP/25/410 safe sustainable e-commerce imports low-value consignments 150 euros
result_summary: Official European Commission press release IP/25/410 found. It supports the EU context on low-value consignments, the 150 euro threshold, customs reform, market fairness, compliance pressure, and environmental concerns.
limits: This official source supports context and policy framing. It does not itself support the Reuters-specific 3 euro July 2026 duty amount and start date.

query: IFS cheapflation poorest households grocery prices Guardian 29.1 23.5
result_summary: Guardian report found on Institute for Fiscal Studies research into cheapflation and poorer households' grocery-price exposure.
limits: This source supports general consumer-impact context only. It does not directly measure the effect of low-value parcel duties or direct-from-China platform purchases.

query: Reuters Shein Temu low-income shoppers Bank of America credit card data bargain online
result_summary: Reuters report found stating that Shein and Temu increasingly appeal to shoppers earning less than 50000 dollars per year and that more low-income shoppers are buying online to find bargains, citing Bank of America credit card data.
limits: This source supports platform-use context only. It does not prove direct EU-duty price impact, UK low-income dependence on these platforms, or exact user demographics for the article.
